title: Monday Music Mix #4
summary: This has been the toughest mix to put together. Three days of work, very little sleep and time. There isn’t a podcast version yet, stay tuned for the same. Download link at the end of the post.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Fourth

This has been the toughest mix to put together. Three days of work, very little sleep and time. There isn’t a podcast version yet, stay tuned for the same. Download link at the end of the post.

Monday Music Mix: 04

Tracklist:

  1. Mumford & Sons - Hold On To What You Believe
  2. Passion Pit - The Reeling
  3. White Lies - Death
  4. Maximo Park - In Another World (You’d Have Found Yourself By Now)
  5. Noisettes - Never Forget You
  6. Gossip - Love Long Distance
  7. Caribou - Odessa (DJ Koze’s Campfire)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download

Listen on Grooveshark

Send your love (if any) and feedback through the comments.
